history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, curly hair is relaxing on a large, light-colored beanbag chair on a sandy beach at night. They are wearing a white t-shirt with a pink graphic design and ripped black jeans. The person is looking down and to the side, with their hand near their mouth, appearing contemplative or thoughtful.

In the background, palm trees with illuminated fronds are swaying gently against a dark blue night sky. Several flags on poles are visible along the shoreline, and beyond them, a bridge or elevated walkway is lit up, with distant buildings and lights suggesting an urban or resort area. Other people can be seen in the background, some walking along the beach and others gathered near the illuminated structures. The sand is textured and shows the imprint of footprints and the beanbag. The overall lighting is dim, with artificial lights from the palm trees, flags, and distant structures creating a warm and inviting atmosphere, contrasting with the dark sky. The mood is relaxed and serene, with a touch of mystery due to the nighttime setting.

Style: Realistic photography, nighttime beach scene, tropical ambiance.
Lighting: Dim, artificial, with warm accents from lights on trees and structures, contrasting with the deep blue of the night sky.
Color Palette: Dominated by the dark blue of the sky, sandy beige, vibrant greens and yellows of the palm fronds, and warm whites and oranges from artificial lights.
Mood: Relaxed, tranquil, contemplative, slightly exotic.
